hero.description: Software Engineer with experience designing end-to-end web applications. 5+ years transforming technical challenges into robust technological solutions.

about.p1: My name is Lewis Garcia. My journey in programming began in my childhood with C++. Today, I specialize in architecting and developing complex integration solutions and SaaS platforms.
about.p2: I graduated with honors as a Computer Engineer and currently share my expertise as an Adjunct Professor at Universidad de Oriente. I am passionate about transforming technical challenges into elegant, robust software solutions.
about.p3: My most ambitious projects include a high-performance flight booking platform that unifies providers with different processes, and IoT control systems for the oil and gas industry.

experience.title: Professional Experience
experience.subtitle: A trajectory of building scalable software and architectural solutions across enterprises.

items.title: Arquitecture & Platform Engineering
items.description: Design and scalability of digital ecosystems for the travel and ecommerce sectors.
achievements: Developed e-commerce applications with custom back-office, featuring embedded Power BI dashboards.
Built an end-to-end airline booking platform utilizing data from multiple GDS for travel agencies.
Automated stadium access systems by programming micro-controllers connected to a digital ticketing platform.

items.title: Academic Leadership & Theory
items.description: Training the next generation of computer engineers.
achievements: Taught the undergraduate course Formal Languages and Automata Theory in the Department of Computer Engineering.

items.title: SaaS Architecture & AI Innovation
items.description: Industrial product architecture and advanced Generative AI solutions.
achievements: Spearheaded the technical architecture and product design of a SaaS platform for the oil industry.
Developed an analysis and control software with real-time data from oil well sensors.
Engineered a RAG Chatbot enabling queries on live production databases and internal documentation.

items.title: IoT Systems & Cloud Integration
items.description: Automation and monitoring of telemetry data using cloud services.
achievements: Automated data acquisition with AWS IoT Core and lambda functions for data from oil well controllers.
Developed a web application in Next.js with dashboards to visualize production data.
Maintained an ASP.NET web application with dashboards for analysis and data management in the oil industry.

items.title: Custom Software Solutions
items.description: Development of custom applications and freelance project management.
achievements: Maintained a web application for managing architecture project data with custom dashboards.
Built a software for employee time tracking across companies, including calculations based on hours worked.
Developed websites such as blogs and product stores.
